creator: sergey.dyatko@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

according to http://libtorrent.rakshasa.no/:

_Stable_ Release is     libtorrent-0.13.2 and rtorrent-0.9.2

so, please update rtorrent-devel/librtorrent-devel instead
rtorrent/librtorrent if you need :) As for me net-p2p/rtorrent works
fine (2 boxes with HEAD, amd64)


-- 
wbr, tiger
